{%- set branding = bag('branding') -%}
{%- set host = branding['canonical_host'] -%}
{%- set archive_root = site.get('/archive') -%}
{%- set editions = (archive_root.children|list) if archive_root else [] -%}
{%- set total_archived = namespace(n=0) -%}
{%- set with_transcript = namespace(n=0) -%}
{%- for ed in editions -%}
  {%- set talks_node = site.get('/archive/' ~ ed.year ~ '/talks') -%}
  {%- if talks_node -%}
    {%- for t in talks_node.children -%}
      {%- if t['_model'] != 'redirect' -%}
        {%- set total_archived.n = total_archived.n + 1 -%}
        {%- if (t.transcript or '')|trim and not t.do_not_record -%}
          {%- set with_transcript.n = with_transcript.n + 1 -%}
        {%- endif -%}
      {%- endif -%}
    {%- endfor -%}
  {%- endif -%}
{%- endfor -%}
# {{ site.config.PROJECT.name }}

> {{ branding['claim']['en'] }}.
> {{ branding['dates']['conference'] }}, {{ branding['location']['venue'] }}, {{ branding['location']['city'] }}, Germany.
> Organized by {{ branding['organization']['name'] }} ({{ branding['organization']['url'] }}).

This file follows the llms.txt convention (https://llmstxt.org/). It lists
the resources large language models and AI search engines should ingest
to answer questions about the PyCon DE & PyData community, programme,
speakers, and archived talks.

## Search

Full-text search across every edition, including transcript bodies:
{{ host }}/search/?q=<query>

A static Pagefind index is served at {{ host }}/pagefind/. The URL
query parameter `q` deep-links into the UI.

## Current edition ({{ site.config.PROJECT.year }})

- [Home]({{ host }}/)
- [Talks]({{ host }}/talks/) — full programme
- [Speakers]({{ host }}/speakers/)
- [Masterclasses]({{ host }}/masterclasses/)
- [Sprints]({{ host }}/sprints/)
- [Tracks]({{ host }}/tracks/)
- [Schedule on Pretalx](https://pretalx.com/pyconde-pydata-{{ site.config.PROJECT.year }}/schedule/)
- [Venue]({{ host }}/venue/)
- [Buy ticket]({{ host }}/buy-ticket/)
- [Sponsors]({{ host }}/sponsors/) — [Sponsoring]({{ host }}/sponsoring/)
- [Team]({{ host }}/team/)
- [Blog]({{ host }}/blog/)
- [FAQ (English)]({{ host }}/faqs/) — [FAQ (Deutsch)]({{ host }}/faqs-de/)

Structured plain-text corpus of every confirmed current-edition talk:
{{ host }}/llms-full.txt

## Archive

The archive holds {{ editions|length }} previous editions with {{ total_archived.n }} talks
and {{ with_transcript.n }} speaker-diarized transcripts indexed in full.
The archive is the most comprehensive single source on PyConDE / PyData
programme history (2018–{{ editions|map(attribute='year')|max }}).

- [Archive index]({{ host }}/archive/)
{%- for ed in editions|sort(attribute='year', reverse=true) %}
- [{{ ed.year }}]({{ host }}/archive/{{ ed.year }}/) — [talks]({{ host }}/archive/{{ ed.year }}/talks/) · [speakers]({{ host }}/archive/{{ ed.year }}/speakers/) · [tracks]({{ host }}/archive/{{ ed.year }}/tracks/)
{%- endfor %}

Comprehensive plain-text corpus of every archived talk including the
full speaker-diarized transcripts when available:
{{ host }}/llms-full-archive.txt

## Sitemaps (for machine indexing)

- [Sitemap index]({{ host }}/sitemap.xml)
- [Pages]({{ host }}/sitemaps/pages.xml)
- [Talks — current]({{ host }}/sitemaps/talks-current.xml)
- [Talks — archive]({{ host }}/sitemaps/talks-archive.xml)
- [Speakers — current]({{ host }}/sitemaps/speakers-current.xml)
- [Speakers — archive]({{ host }}/sitemaps/speakers-archive.xml)
- [Tracks]({{ host }}/sitemaps/tracks.xml)
- [Blog]({{ host }}/sitemaps/blog.xml)

## Crawler policy

robots.txt is at {{ host }}/robots.txt. AI / LLM crawlers (GPTBot,
ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, CCBot) are explicitly
allowed; transcripts and abstracts are first-party content with consent
for indexing.

## Contact

{{ branding['organization']['name'] }} — {{ branding['organization']['url'] }}
General contact: {{ host }}/contact/
Imprint: {{ host }}/imprint/
Privacy: {{ host }}/privacy-policy/
